segments.text: Many people have always asked Me, that why God created this universe.
They are not supposed to ask questions of God
It's easy for them when they give a lecture
And Why He created the Universe
It's something like, why I wore all these ornaments?
Because am not habituated of wearing ornaments.
But have to do it just please you people
or we can say that God created this earth
Just to please His own children
And enter into the Kingdom Of God
To give what He has got
this creation in such a way that he could create his own image,
reflect it and make enjoy itself.
It's very mutual appreciation as we call it Andhola
whatever He does for us is His own pleasure
but the beauty of its that your pleasure is His pleasure
And the other way round is His pleasure should be your pleasure too.
But God's efforts are such that they cannot be enjoyed unless and until
So whatever He has given us, we can not count them
because it is an abstract way of saying things
We cannot say what He has done for us.
And when this joy of His creation is felt in our heart,
once we start enjoying that joy within ourselves
then it becomes a complete pinching
When It's complete you can't describe
of enjoyment, is described that at the depth what are we to say?
We have lost. The drop has become
an ocean and then it becomes a drop
First the Ocean becomes a Drop
And then Drop becomes the Ocean
Which can only be appreciated by people
It's very easy to say there is no God, it' s the easiest thing to say.
Is the easiest way because He saw available, He was so anxious
To give you happiness as today when I had to go to the bank
I was wondering, I have never worn these ornaments any time in life
and today as the times has come up to wear.
And just thought of it is
Just for My children if i had to wear them
If They feel happy then my happiness is gone
But you felt For Me that I should wear
itself shows that you wanted to see them only.
This is also suggestive of your very subtle love thing,
Very subtle love for Mother in these modern times
Is a big blessing for us
So as You say mother blessers
I'll tell you also bless me
Your already blessed Me by this beautiful arrangement
Surrender yourself for this great puja,
because all is such an interdependent process.
You do the Puja? I can't be in a Puja!
When we will do the Pooja
But he knew they were awakened
Now how explain people what's importance of Pooja is
If you have not tasted fruit of a kunja, it is impossible to explain.
It's at the higher level only one can understand all these things
but so far whatever was done
by such low type people that everything became absolutely unholy
It was all unholy doing, and because of that unholy-doing God Himself is unhappy.
So He has created this universe to create realized souls – not to create useless people
Not to create people who do not believe in God,
Who don't believe a higher life.
Who doesn' t belive in leading the lives of
He never created this universe for them
So those that believe in god
are actually, in a way giving blessings to God
because it's so pleasurable for Him
Sahaja Yogis also some of them had problems
but as long the desire is pure
You Have To Do Your Ascent In A Proper Way
Kingdom of God within our heart
less is there, it's from the other side.
He has created this universe so beautifully
and after creating that beautiful Universe
Only another fifty percent job you have
You shouldn't worry if There are people
Who arenot interested in Sahaja Yoga
Those who're not goingto do meditation
those who are not going to do puja,
though…those who don't enjoy this higher life.
And then we have create the nucleus
that the speed of everything has come down to zero for me now.
Nothing is moving, there's no Gatil in Me anymore
so enamored and overwhelmed by your celebration
That I just don't know how express myself
For something i have done nothing also
I've done nothing, because I have not achieved anything in life myself.
I was what i am and will be the same
.I haven't done any tapasya or anything
,i havent walked even an inch to achieve my goal
It's you who has prepared yourself
Who had come closer and closer
and got to yourself, ignited, enlightened yourself because of your preparation.
It's only Your own doing which has given this light every day
You know very well that the Light cannot spread in vacuum
If there is a vacuum then the Light cannot spread
That why without these Sahaja Yogis I have no existence at all
I don't exist. My whole existence is here because
i have no meaning,i've got no work
Actually your birthday must be celebrated
There is no difference in any way and I think it should be the birthday of Sahaja Yoga which
will celebrated today that we can say to them, but it's about twelve years or months
then sahaj yoga was started on a public place. Though i have started long time back
I don't know how many years back.
So at this stage we have to understand
that puja is an abstract achievement
and all of you should sit with the feeling
that we are going to achieve nothingness within us,
So the light of love should flood all areas within us
and this is only possible when
of course the chakras have to be awakened
And also you should open up your hearts completely
Just receive it with complete faith and understanding
We have people from all over the countries
I feel that already we've touched every corner in this world
we have to declare that, let Sahaja Yoga become a Mahayoga in its full way.
That everybody of the whole world should recognize
that sahaj yoga is only way people can
rise into their evolution and new worlds will be created
which is not of outer world but of the inner world,
that you all should take a bow,
and then we'll try to bring more people into Sahaja Yoga
as many times possible through your efforts.
That's the only thing if You can give me on my birthday
I will be very much thankful
